title: Abu Dhabi ADIC hires BlackRock veteran to lead real assets
summary: He will oversee investments across global infrastructure and real estate at ADIC
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Panoramic view of Abu Dhabi´s skyline, with the landmarks Etihad Towers, the Emirates Palace and ongoing offshore constructions on the nearby island at dusk. Image courtesy: Juergen Sack/Getty Images

He will oversee investments across global infrastructure and real estate at ADIC

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

Abu Dhabi Investment Council, wholly owned by Mubadala Investment Company, has appointed Edward Winter as Chief Investment Officer for Real Assets.
